_comment: Add a _ before an option name to comment it out and it wont be added to the apworld
Using 'goal' as the name of an option let you override some of the generated goal parameters
goal.description: How to End your Randomized playthrough.

filler_traps._comment: Using values here let you set a 'recommended' filler_trap percentage or even a default percentage

description: Start with the ability to set a mark (Teleport-Mark). Recommended for a faster game.
Start with your wand slot (Slot-Wand). Turning this off is not recommended as it may make Rattlebones difficult or impossible on some schools.
Start with your mount slot (Slot-Mount). Highly recommended to reduce walking time. Turning this off will still require the mount slot be given before Judd.
Ensures the Teleport-Mark ability is given prior to CL Fodder, Harvest Lord, and Bastilla quests.
Enables Friendly Teleports in logic and grants access to them in the starting inventory. Default false, but recommended for more a more varied earlygame (pre-Rattlebones).
Allows Akilles Skip in logic. Default false to prevent confusing the uninitiated, but recommended to be enabled.
Allows entering the Three Streets pre-Judd in logic. Default false to prevent confusing the uninitiated, but recommended to be enabled. Only relevant with Friendly Teleports disabled.
Allows the player to choose which reagents to add as check locations.
Allows the player to choose which Halloween quests to add as check locations.
Default false. Temporary option for testing.
This is a Toggle
A simple boolean, aka True or False set the initial value with "default"
This is a Choice
Let the user pick from a list of values
allow_custom_value let a player define their own text value
Currently the only use for Choice in Manual outside of hooks is the goal
This is a Range
Allow the player to specify a value between 'start' and 'end'
if you include a "values" you can define the label for certain values
Currently the only use for Range in Manual outside of hooks is 'filler_trap'
